description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora Docker image and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named pok3rtool:linux that runs a before_script installing gcc, gcc-c++, cmake, make, openssl-devel, and libusb-devel via dnf, then executes mkdir build, cd build, cmake -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=\"Release\" .., and make; it sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, tags the runner with linux, and stores the built binaries (build/pok3rtool, build/libpok3rlib.so, build/rawhid/librawhid.so, build/libchaos/chaos/libchaos.so) as artifacts named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. In the test stage add a job named test:linux that depends on pok3rtool:linux, runs a before_script installing libstdc++, openssl, and libusb via dnf, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, and runs cd build && ./pok3rtool list; it also uses the fedora image and the linux tag.
